summary: P1.8-10 B2.2: seller-home-grid mosaic at 1024px+ with shop info sidebar, 2-column báo cáo metrics grid from 768px, header shop info hidden on desktop; mobile single-column stack preserved.

interfaceChanges.description: Optional dataTestId and statusTestId props for sidebar vs header instances.

mappings.criterion: seller-home-grid class applied to Home shell at ≥1024px
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue231_seller_home_grid.test.tsx::wraps home summary in seller-home-grid mosaic shell

mappings.criterion: Báo cáo metric tiles use 2-column layout on tablet/desktop breakpoints
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue231_seller_home_grid.test.tsx::uses 2-column metrics grid class on báo cáo chart tiles

mappings.criterion: No horizontal scroll at 320px mobile (grid collapses to stack)
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue231_seller_home_grid.test.tsx::mobile metrics grid stacks without horizontal overflow wrapper

mappings.criterion: At 1280px viewport, grid columns > 1 for chart area
